reasons: localized structured geography route and global navigation
reviewed facility, residency, and habitat public projections
public location precision and country-level privacy semantics
map provider attribution, failure, and export contract

reproducibility.detail: The Slice 6 implementation has not yet completed Linux and Windows clean-checkout CI from an immutable implementation commit.

static_correctness.detail: Web lint, TypeScript typecheck, production build, release ownership, public-boundary, and provider-contract checks pass locally.

public_contracts.detail: The localized map route uses canonical URL state for mode, focus, country, status, immutable data snapshot, and selected result; invalid values normalize by permanent redirect; /map and /global-distribution redirect by request language while preserving task state.

media_and_content_truth.detail: Institutions and individual footprints derive from reviewed facilities and residency records; current and historical states remain distinct; wild conservation data is identified as live API or a named partial cached public release; public precision is facility, locality, province, or country and precise geometry is not exposed in structured result content.
evidence: country-level records are not rendered as institution points: PASS

browser_journeys.detail: The complete browser suite covers all three structured map modes, reviewed current and historical footprints, URL normalization, result selection, bilingual state preservation, native keyboard controls, no-JavaScript rendering, legacy redirects, existing Atlas/profile/lineage journeys, and provider-free completion.

automated_accessibility.detail: Chinese and English structured map pages pass desktop and 320-pixel mobile axe WCAG A/AA scans, native keyboard filtering, no-horizontal-overflow checks, and reduced-motion verification.
evidence: Chinese institutions and English wild-conservation desktop/mobile axe journeys: PASS
mobile native structured-map filter journey: PASS

visual_regression.detail: No immutable Slice 6 Staging deployment and named semantic visual review are yet bound to this implementation.

performance_budgets.detail: The production build reports 107 kB First Load JS for the localized structured map route, below the 220 KiB structured-route budget and without loading MapLibre or external map tiles.

staging.detail: An immutable Cloudflare Staging deployment, bundle checksum, real API verification, and Staging browser/accessibility results are not yet recorded for Slice 6.

human_signoff.detail: Named product-owner review of bilingual geography wording, current versus historical semantics, public precision, source states, provider attribution, mobile reflow, and URL sharing is not yet recorded for Slice 6.

release_decision.detail: Local implementation evidence is complete, but clean-checkout CI, immutable Staging identity, real API verification, and named Slice 6 review remain incomplete. This manifest must not be interpreted as release GO.
